novel_features.name: Workflow compound commands
novel_features.description: Compound commands that combine multiple API operations into one verb (see `workflow --help`).

novel_features.name: Capability discovery via `which`
novel_features.description: Resolve a natural-language capability query to the best matching command from this CLI's curated feature index.
novel_features.example: superhuman-pp-cli which 'snooze a thread for tomorrow'

narrative.headline: Read, draft, send, and snooze Superhuman email from your terminal or Claude Code.
narrative.value_prop: Superhuman email from your terminal or Claude Code, backed by a local SQLite store and agent-native JSON I/O.
narrative.auth_narrative: Superhuman has no public API key. Lift your Firebase JWT from a logged-in Chrome session via DevTools (Application > Local Storage > mail.superhuman.com), then persist it with `superhuman-pp-cli auth set-token <jwt>`. Firebase JWTs expire after ~1 hour; the CLI returns 401 when stale and you re-paste the current value.

quickstart.comment: Persist the JWT lifted from your Chrome session
Confirm auth and connectivity are green
Populate the local SQLite store for offline analysis
List recent threads as structured JSON

troubleshoots.fix: Run `superhuman-pp-cli doctor` to confirm the JWT is set, then re-paste a fresh JWT from Chrome DevTools and re-run `auth set-token`. Firebase JWTs expire roughly hourly.

troubleshoots.symptom: auth setup says no token configured
troubleshoots.fix: Set SUPERHUMAN_JWT in your environment or persist it with `superhuman-pp-cli auth set-token <jwt>`.

troubleshoots.symptom: threads list is empty after sync
troubleshoots.fix: Confirm `doctor --json` shows a recent sync; if not, re-run `sync --full`.
The JWT may be from a different account or expired; re-paste a fresh JWT and retry.

narrative.when_to_use: Pick the Superhuman CLI when you want email read/draft/respond access from a terminal or Claude Code, scriptable thread search backed by a local store, capability discovery via `which`, or Ask AI semantic search piped into other tools.

recipes.title: Fast triage view across recent threads
recipes.explanation: Pull a wide swath of recent threads with only the fields you need; pipe to jq or an LLM for further triage.

recipes.title: Draft from stdin and send with an undo window
recipes.command: echo 'Body text here' | superhuman-pp-cli drafts write --to teammate@example.com --subject 'Update' --stdin && superhuman-pp-cli messages --draft-message-id <draft-id> --delay 30
recipes.explanation: Write a draft from a piped body, then send it with a 30s undo window — agents can abort before the send fires.

recipes.title: Snooze a thread for later
recipes.explanation: Schedule a thread to resurface at a specific time; pair with `reminders cancel` to un-snooze.

recipes.title: Discover a capability by description
recipes.command: superhuman-pp-cli which 'send an email with an undo window'
recipes.explanation: Resolve a natural-language capability query to the best matching command from this CLI's curated feature index.

recipes.title: Ask AI semantic search across mail
recipes.command: superhuman-pp-cli ai --query 'what did Alice say about pricing last week' --agent
recipes.explanation: Run a semantic query through Superhuman's Ask AI surface; --agent gives you JSON streams pipeable to other tools.
